summary: Sync final pattern set to guru-web retriever.ts as defense-in-depth; mark V8 resolved in design doc
description: guru-web keeps its runtime strip as belt-and-suspenders but the pattern set must match the hardened one (currently it provably misses the hyphenated Sacred-Texts form). Update docs/summary/document-knowledge-data-structures.md V8 to resolved, pointing at boilerplate-audit.md and this parent. Note residual strip in build_dossiers stays specced (§1.2).

resolution.note: guru-web retriever.ts hardened (NAV_PREFIX hyphenated/no-nav-links forms, [Pg N] marker, NAV_TAIL; 9/9 tests incl. 4 new V8 regressions; type-check clean; committed on guru-web branch chore/v8-apparatus-sync @ f7ce1e4). Design doc V8 marked resolved.
